title: senecio farriae
intro: Senecio farriae, also known as Mexican flame flower or golden dust, is a flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its vibrant yellow and red flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Senecio farriae include reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and alleviating menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
